authority: docs/DELIVERY_CONTROL.md — pre-delivery review gate for outbound reports/artifacts. Reusable across delivery activities (telemetry reports, stakeholder reports). Gate: tools/predelivery_gate.py.

playtest_telemetry.description: Playtest telemetry summary + charts to product owner
review_checklist: Charts render correctly and match the summary numbers (runs, completion %, endings).
Every WARN/FAIL metric is expected or acknowledged (e.g. is the boss difficulty spike intended, or a balance bug?).
Summary text is accurate and contains no player PII.
Sample size is adequate for the conclusion (small n = directional only, not statistical).
This is the intended product-owner Telegram channel and an appropriate time to send (not mid-broken-build).

checks.detail: No hard-FAIL metrics in the report (override with --allow-metric-fail after human review)
